channel.title: Magazine on Aman Ahuja
channel.description: Recent content in Magazine on Aman Ahuja

item.title: Acquisition of Drink Me magazine
item.description:
Originally published on my old blog, Pafnuty blog. Reposted here as an effort to consolidate writing into one place. The original publication date was: January 23, 2013.

Some of you may know that for some years now I’ve been working with Drink Me magazine. Recently, Drink Me was acquired, marking the end of a wonderful digression in my life.

I met Daniel Yaffe, the co-founder of Drink Me magazine, in 2008, on the advisory board of Momentus International. Before long I was working with Daniel and his co-founder Eriq Wities on developing a website for Open Content’s new project. The work was low stress, the people were fun to work with, and we all became good friends.
